Interior (Repeat Client)",quote:"We had a great experience with JOMO. They understood our requirements well, shared clear 3D designs, and guided us in choosing the right colors. The work was completed on time, within budget, and the quality was excellent. It has been a year, the quality remains great, so we confidently chose them again recently for our apartment kitchen interior â€” and they delivered perfectly once more. Special thanks to Vineeth for his professionalism, responsiveness, and smooth coordination. Highly recommended for anyone looking for reliable, budget-friendly, and high-quality interior work.",image:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1580489944761-15a19d654956?auto=format&fit=crop&w=120&q=80"},{name:"Yogi TR",location:"Mogappair, Chennai",apartment:"Brigade Xanadu",rating:5,layout:"Full Home Interior Package",quote:"JOMO did a wonderful Interior job for our flat in Brigade Xanadu. The perfection, finish was more than the standards expected. We were guided all through right from the designing phase, material selection & until installation. The team was fully supportive at any point of time, humble and friendly. My rating is 5 stars for them. Special thanks to Mr.Vineeth-co-founder, Ms. Maheshwari-Designer & Mr. Kaaliraj- Site Engineer.",image:""},{name:"Dr. Nemanth Sanjeev",location:"Chennai",apartment:"Premium Apartment",rating:5,layout:"Full Interior & Custom Add-ons",quote:"Thanks JOMO you did an amazing job at an affordable pricing. Me being a medical professional didnâ€™t have time to supervise their work which wasnâ€™t required as they did their work professionally and had no correction even if it had they had seen and rectified it before even i noticed it. I had a very pleasant experience with these guys. Starting from designers to site engineers and workers all of them were professional and upto the mark. Their work is commendable. Kaliraj, Maheshwari, vineeth anas and even their carpenters were really helpful and was always available to clarify out our doubts and also i had some extra works to be done which they did without any hesitation. Special mention to kaliraj and anas who were polite and always available. I would 10/10 recommend them.",image:""},{name:"Amutha Amutha",location:"Chennai",apartment:"Mogappair Experience Center",rating:5,layout:"Full Home Makeover (In Progress)",quote:"The experience centre was a great way to see the quality of their work before starting our own project. Canâ€™t wait to see our completed home makeover!",image:""},{name:"Joshua Williams",location:"International Client",apartment:"14â€™ x 14â€™ Modular Kitchen",rating:5,layout:"Premium Kitchen Interior",quote:"Dynamic and highly professional team, with vast knowledge of home interior works. Guided and assisted us in selecting materials for our kitchen. Although we live outside India, and communicated only through w.app and e-mails, they were able to understand our needs and executed and finished our 14â€™ x 14â€™ kitchen neatly according to our requirements, plan and color scheme. We highly recommend JOMO home interiors.",image:""}],g2=[{question:"Is the interior consultation 100% free?",answer:"Yes! Our initial 30-minute design consultation is 100% free with absolutely no pressure, obligation, or hidden fees. We provide a space planning discussion, initial material recommendations, and a detailed budget estimate that you can keep."},{question:"How long does the consultation take?",answer:"A standard initial design discussion takes about 30 to 45 minutes. We can host you at our Chennai Experience Center in Mogappair or conduct a virtual session via Zoom, depending on your preference."},{question:"Do you work across my city?",answer:"Yes, we provide end-to-end interior services across all regions of Chennai, including Mogappair, OMR, Adyar, Velachery, Anna Nagar, Porur, Thiruvanmiyur, Sholinganallur, and surrounding areas."},{question:"What is the estimated project timeline?",answer:"We offer a guaranteed 45-day turnkey handover from the day your engineering drawings are finalized and locked.
